VIE] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) ORDER New Delhi, the 12thMay, 2005 S.0.665(E).—In exercise ofthe powers conferred by Sub-section (1) ofSection 3 ofthe Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974), the Central Government hereby specially empowers Ms. Kameswari Subramanian, Joint Secretary to the Government of India, for the purpose ofthe said Section. \F. No. 671/18/2001-CUS. VIII] N. M. KRISHNAN, Dy.
